title: aspidium ellipticum
intro: Aspidium ellipticum, also known as the Autumn fern, is a type of fern native to Asia and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Aspidium ellipticum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote digestion. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its dried fronds can be used in herbal remedies to treat various health issues.
